title: Security by Design: Ontology-Grounded AI Runtime Research Release v1.0.0
description:
Research program release v1.0.0 for the SbD-AI Runtime / AppSec Core line. This curated release includes code, dataset-grade research artifacts, and three related papers covering ontology design, coverage-preserving normalization of public sources, and ontology-grounded retrieval.

Homepage: https://www.securitybydesign.dev
Published manual: https://www.securitybydesign.dev/sbd-toe/sbd-manual/

creators.name: Farinha, Pedro
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher / Shiftleft - Secure Software Engineering, Lda.
